mapper.sql: select id, user_id, device_id, type, value, longitude, latitude, state, create_time, update_by, update_time, update_content, location from qkyd_exception
mapper.select: SELECT su.age, su.nick_name as nickName, su.sex, su.phonenumber, qkyd_exception.* FROM sys_user su JOIN qkyd_exception ON su.user_id = qkyd_exception.user_id where id = #{id}

SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM qkyd_exception
user_id IS NOT NULL AND qkyd_exception.type = #{type}
select id, user_id, device_id, type, value, longitude, latitude, state, create_time as readTime, location from qkyd_exception order by id desc
mapper.insert:
insert into qkyd_exception
user_id, device_id, type, value, longitude, latitude, state, create_time, update_by, update_time, update_content, location,
#{userId}, #{deviceId}, #{type}, #{value}, #{longitude}, #{latitude}, #{state}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{updateContent}, #{location},
mapper.delete:
delete from qkyd_exception where id in
#{id}
